TestCase z6Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_k = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_k, t1.k, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.k = follow_case_k;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n == 0
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: set a random position's element to maximum double if it is less
    int idx = rand() % follow_case.n;
    const double MAX_DOUBLE = 1.7976931348623157e+308;
    if (follow_case.k[idx] < MAX_DOUBLE) {
        follow_case.k[idx] = MAX_DOUBLE;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
